clinical_notes: Patient presents with substernal chest pain radiating to left arm and progressive dyspnea on exertion. HbA1c 11.4%, fasting glucose 316 mg/dL confirming poorly controlled Type 2 Diabetes. ECG shows ST-segment depression in leads V4-V6. LDL 204 mg/dL, HDL 29 mg/dL, Triglycerides 390 mg/dL. Troponin I mildly elevated at 0.08 ng/mL. Peripheral neuropathy bilateral lower limbs. Diabetic foot ulcer grade 2 on left heel. Referred urgently to cardiology and endocrinology.
